name: Reconciliation Check — Daily Unreconciled Entry Analysis

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4.1', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a senior accountant analyzing unreconciled journal entries for TBWA\SMP (Philippines). Provide actionable findings: identify potential matches, flag aging items (>30 days), highlight large variances, and suggest specific corrections. Format as markdown with sections: ## Summary, ## AR Analysis, ## AP Analysis, ## Bank Analysis, ## Recommended Actions.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Analyze these unreconciled entries for Company 2 (TBWA\SMP):

AR: ' + $json.ar_count + ' entries, total residual PHP ' + $json.ar_total.toFixed(2) + '
AP: ' + $json.ap_count + ' entries, total residual PHP ' + $json.ap_total.toFixed(2) + '
Bank: ' + $json.bank_count + ' entries, total residual PHP ' + $json.bank_total.toFixed(2) + '
Other: ' + $json.other_count + ' entries

Top AR items: ' + JSON.stringify(($json.groups.AR || []).slice(0, 10)) + '
Top AP items: ' + JSON.stringify(($json.groups.AP || []).slice(0, 10)) + '
Top Bank items: ' + JSON.stringify(($json.groups.Bank || []).slice(0, 10)) }], max_tokens: 1500, temperature: 0.3 }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', task_id: $json, message: 'Reconciliation check completed' }) }}

parameters.text:
=:ledger: *Reconciliation Check Complete*
• AR: {{ $('Group by Account Type').first().json.ar_count }} unreconciled (PHP {{ $('Group by Account Type').first().json.ar_total.toFixed(2) }})
• AP: {{ $('Group by Account Type').first().json.ap_count }} unreconciled (PHP {{ $('Group by Account Type').first().json.ap_total.toFixed(2) }})
• Bank: {{ $('Group by Account Type').first().json.bank_count }} unreconciled (PHP {{ $('Group by Account Type').first().json.bank_total.toFixed(2) }})
• Task created and assigned to BOM for review
